URBANmetRics 1.0.0
  • Reference

Package index

Core Functions

building_metrics()
Compute Building Metrics for an AOI
building_structure()
Extract Building Features for an AOI Using Predefined OSM Tags
building_tags
Predefined OSM building tags
osm_metrics()
Compute Basic OSM Metrics for an AOI
osm_structure()
Query and Prepare OSM Features for a Given AOI
green_metrics()
Compute Green Space Metrics for an AOI
green_structure()
Extract Green Space Features for an AOI Using Predefined OSM Tags
green_tags
Predefined OSM green-space tags
transport_metrics()
Compute Transport Metrics for an AOI
transport_structure()
Extract Transport Features for an AOI Using Predefined OSM Tags
transport_tags
Predefined OSM transport tags
urban_index()
Compute Urban Indices for Building, Green, and Transport Metrics
